label: CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels

node.label: CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels
node.definition: CUDA, ROCm, Triton, and custom kernels map tensor operations onto accelerator threads, memory tiles, vector units, and communication primitives.
